headline: Clinical AI | Agentic LLM Systems | Multimodal AI | Research-to-Production Leadership
blurb: AI scientist and engineering leader with experience spanning production radiology reporting, multimodal generative AI products, and medical imaging research. Built and scaled agentic LLM systems for clinical workflows, founded a multimodal video AI platform, and translated research depth into reliable infrastructure, deployment, and measurable product impact.

metrics.label: Years in AI
metrics.detail: Experience across research and production, strengthened by specialized medical imaging training through ERASMUS+ and UBC.

metrics.label: Production Releases Shipped
metrics.detail: Major production releases led for Report Assistant at Synthesis Health.

metrics.label: Clinical Reports / Month
metrics.detail: Production reporting volume supported by Report Assistant at Synthesis Health.

metrics.label: AI Videos Generated
metrics.detail: Multimodal generation volume delivered through OmniSync AI.

metrics.label: Research Publications
metrics.detail: Published and cited across many top-tier journals and conferences in medical imaging and AI.

metrics.label: Scholar
metrics.detail: Recipient of the highly competitive Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Scholarship in Medical Imaging and Applications.

metrics.label: Planning Speedup
metrics.detail: Reduced prostate brachytherapy planning time from about 20 minutes to about 3 seconds.

valueProps: Agentic LLM systems for clinical reporting, validation, and structured output generation in production settings.
Research-to-production AI delivery across medical imaging, high-stakes clinical workflows, and real-world deployment constraints.
Cloud-native ML infrastructure across AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, distributed inference, and production monitoring.
Multimodal generative AI systems for video, audio, and speech workflows under latency and cost constraints.
Technical leadership spanning product direction, experimentation, shipping, and mentoring ML and engineering teams.
